zh.siteSubtitle: 南非裔美国基督教先知（1956-2016）
zh.homeIntro1: 金·克莱门特（Kim Clement，1956年9月30日—2016年11月23日），出生于南非开普敦，是一位灵恩派基督教先知、音乐人和敬拜领袖。他年轻时曾深陷毒瘾，后经历信仰转变，声称获得了预言的恩赐。
zh.homeIntro2: 克莱门特以其独特的「歌唱式预言」著称——他常在钢琴前即兴弹唱中传递预言信息。他的电视节目《预言警报》（Prophetic Alert）在全球播出，吸引了大量追随者。他的预言风格激情澎湃，常在公开聚会中当众宣告。
zh.homeIntro3: 克莱门特最广为人知的预言是关于唐纳德·特朗普将成为美国总统——这一预言在特朗普宣布参选前数年就已发出。他还预言了科学突破、经济变化和中东局势等。2016年11月，克莱门特在特朗普当选后不久去世，享年60岁。
zh.coreQuote: 「特朗普将成为总统。上帝说：我将把他放在那里，他会在两个任期内成为不寻常的总统。」
keyPointsList: 1974年 —— 信仰转变，走出毒瘾，开始事工
2006年 —— 首次公开预言特朗普将成为总统
2007年 —— 预言美国将出现两任总统
2014年 —— 再次确认特朗普总统预言
2016年11月 —— 特朗普当选后不久去世
sourceList: 预言内容来自金·克莱门特公开聚会录像和其官方事工存档（Kim Clement Official）
部分预言录像可在 YouTube 上查阅（Kim Clement Center YouTube）
验证评价基于公开新闻报道和统计数据
编者观点不代表学术定论
站点图标采用麦克风符号——克莱门特以「歌唱式先知」闻名，麦克风是他在舞台上传递预言的标志性道具

en.homeIntro1: Kim Clement (September 30, 1956 – November 23, 2016), born in Cape Town, South Africa, was a charismatic Christian prophet, musician, and worship leader. After struggling with drug addiction in his youth, he experienced a spiritual transformation and claimed to receive the gift of prophecy.
en.homeIntro2: Clement was known for his distinctive 'singing prophecy' style — he often delivered prophetic messages while improvising at the piano. His TV show 'Prophetic Alert' aired globally and attracted a large following. His prophetic style was passionate, often declaring prophecies publicly at large gatherings.
en.homeIntro3: Clement's most famous prediction was that Donald Trump would become president of the United States — a prophecy made years before Trump announced his candidacy. He also prophesied about scientific breakthroughs, economic shifts, and Middle East events. Clement passed away in November 2016, shortly after Trump's election, at age 60.
en.coreQuote: "Trump shall become a president. God says, I will put him in that place, and he shall be an unusual president for two terms."
keyPointsList: 1956 —— Born in Cape Town, South Africa
1974 —— Spiritual transformation, overcame addiction, began ministry
2006 —— First public prophecy about Trump becoming president
2007 —— Prophesied about two presidents in America
November 2016 —— Passed away shortly after Trump's election
sourceList: Prophecies sourced from Kim Clement's public ministry recordings and official archives (Kim Clement Official)
Some prophecy recordings available on YouTube (Kim Clement Center YouTube)
Verification based on public news reports and statistical data
Editorial opinions do not represent academic consensus
Site icon: microphone symbol — Clement was known as the 'Singing Prophet', and the microphone was his iconic prop for delivering prophecies on stage
